reason: QA test for browser use feature: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title, and returned the response "The page title is Example Domain."
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent homepage with agent list in sidebar.
Found the "QA-20260417-234020-8axj" agent in the sidebar — Agent was visible in the list marked as "idle" status.
Clicked on the "QA-20260417-234020-8axj" agent in the sidebar — Agent details page opened, showing message input box and agent information.
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input box — Message appeared in the textbox with correct content.
Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and a new session titled "Browser Page Title Check" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes (180 seconds) for response — Agent completed its work in 6 seconds.

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is Example Domain." Also visible: browser preview showing the Example Domain page, completed "Open Browser" action, and "Browser Command $ get title" action both showing checkmarks.
